scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @ibm-vibe/types && npm run build -w @ibm-vibe/config
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w agent-service-api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w agent-service-api
scripts.test:ts: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w agent-service-api
scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:agent-service
